character.definition: sails, the mat-covering of small boats, (interchangeable 軬) the covering of a carriage
(same as 鬣) long beard or whiskers, a mane; bristles, as on a hog; dorsal fins
dry, dandruff-like scales of dead flesh and skin
a kind of herb medicine; Bupleurum
stride of man; 15th lunar mansion, determinative star η Andromedae
a bamboo whisk; the broken end of a bamboo stalk
one of the Three Kingdoms, established by Liu Bei
